children.label: A
children.text: conduct or support evaluations consistent with the Center’s mission as described in ;section 9561(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: evaluate programs under title I of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 ( et seq.);20 U.S.C. 6301

children.label: C
children.text: to the extent practicable, examine evaluations conducted or supported by others in order to determine the quality and relevance of the evidence of effectiveness generated by those evaluations, with the approval of the Director;

children.label: D
children.text: coordinate the activities of the National Center for Education Evaluation and Regional Assistance with other evaluation activities in the Department;

children.label: E
children.text: review and, where feasible, supplement Federal education program evaluations, particularly those by the Department, to determine or enhance the quality and relevance of the evidence generated by those evaluations;

children.label: G
children.text: assist the Director in the preparation of the biennial report, as described in .section 9519 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: adhere to the highest possible standards of quality for conducting scientifically valid education evaluation; and

children.heading: Administration of evaluations under the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965
children.label: b Administration of evaluations under the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965
children.text: The Evaluation and Regional Assistance Commissioner, consistent with the mission of the National Center for Education Evaluation and Regional Assistance under , shall administer all operations and contracts associated with evaluations authorized by section 8601 of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 [] and administered by the Department as of .section 9561(b) of this title20 U.S.C. 7981November 5, 2002
